data/maps/DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F/t.DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_StoneC: There's a stone cavern at the edge\nof town.\pI've heard you can find rare stones\nthere.
data/maps/DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F/t.DewfordTown_PokemonCenter_1F_Text_Fainte: Even if a POKéMON faints and can't\nbattle, it can still use a move learned\lfrom a Hidden Machine, HM.
